## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Docs only
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change

## Validation

- [ ] `docker compose config` passes
- [ ] App boots locally
- [ ] Health endpoints respond
- [ ] Docs updated (if needed)

## Checklist

- [ ] No secrets committed
- [ ] Scope is focused and reviewable
- [ ] Changelog updated (if user-facing change)
